prompt:
Several fresh hornwort (Ceratophyllum demersum) cuttings arranged in a loose fan, each a thin flexible bright-green stem with no visible woody base, completely covered from base to tip in very fine soft needle-like leaves arranged in dense whorls all along the stem, so that almost no bare stem is visible. The cuttings look like natural broken segments taken from a larger floating hornwort plant, with slightly irregular snapped ends and some leaves splaying outward, resting on a wet dark slate tile with scattered water droplets, clearly showing the feathery, underwater-pine texture of the foliage.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 macro or product-style shot inside a 2040s Pacific floating-city habitat: sleek light-grey lab surface or prep table with faint cyan and magenta LED accents, curved wall panels and storage niches in the softly blurred background, a subtle holographic interface element or status icon hovering near the work area, environment tidy and high-tech, background slightly blurred, no hands, no people, no text, no logos or watermarks.
